name: Brownies II
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. CAKE: In a mixing bowl, combine the dry ingredients.
3. Add the walnuts if using; stir in the soy milk and mix until well blended.
4. Pour the batter into an ungreased 8-inch baking pan and set aside.
5. SAUCE: Combine the cocoa powder and sugar in a separate bowl.
6. Pour boiling water over the mixture and stir well to ensure it is fully dissolved.
7. Gently pour the sauce over the batter.
8. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the cake tests done. Set aside to cool before serving.
